title: glyceria nervata var. rigida
intro: Glyceria nervata var. rigida, also known as Hard Fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glyceria nervata var. rigida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
